title: OpenStack Keystone KOG
description: Krateo Operator Generator (KOG) packaging that turns OpenStack Keystone identity resources (projects, users, roles, groups, domains, role assignments, application credentials) into native Kubernetes custom resources. A Composition of this chart lets a user point the bundled auth-bridge at their Keystone endpoint and toggle which per-resource RestDefinitions are emitted.

restdefinitions.title: RestDefinitions
restdefinitions.description: Per-resource RestDefinition toggles. Each Keystone payload is envelope-wrapped, so every Kind is prefixed Identity* to avoid the crdgen Kind-vs-property collision.

resourceGroup.title: Resource group
resourceGroup.description: API group for the generated CRD.

resourceGroup.title: Resource group
resourceGroup.description: API group for the generated CRD.

resourceGroup.title: Resource group
resourceGroup.description: API group for the generated CRD.

group.title: IdentityGroup
group.description: Keystone /v3/groups. Disabled by default: crdgen emits an undefined Go type for the 'group' envelope property and fails CRD generation; ships ready to enable once the upstream crdgen fix lands.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Emit the IdentityGroup RestDefinition (off by default due to a crdgen quirk).

resourceGroup.title: Resource group
resourceGroup.description: API group for the generated CRD.

domain.title: IdentityDomain
domain.description: Keystone /v3/domains (create/get/update/delete). A domain must be disabled (update with enabled:false) before it can be deleted.

resourceGroup.title: Resource group
resourceGroup.description: API group for the generated CRD.

role_assignment.title: IdentityRoleAssignment
role_assignment.description: Keystone role grant (PUT/DELETE on a composite project/user/role path), modeled as a single-fire idempotent CR.

resourceGroup.title: Resource group
resourceGroup.description: API group for the generated CRD.

application_credential.title: IdentityApplicationCredential
application_credential.description: Keystone /v3/users/{user_id}/application_credentials. Disabled by default: KOG leaks the path-only user_id into the create body and Keystone returns 400; get/delete work and the CRD generates. Enabling clean create needs a KOG exclude-from-body mapping.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Emit the IdentityApplicationCredential RestDefinition (off by default due to a create body-leak).

resourceGroup.title: Resource group
resourceGroup.description: API group for the generated CRD.

authBridge.title: Auth bridge
authBridge.description: A stateless openstacksdk reverse proxy: it authenticates with a clouds.yaml, discovers the Keystone identity endpoint, and injects a fresh X-Auth-Token on every call. The generated controllers' plain-HTTP requests are routed through it.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Deploy the auth-bridge proxy (Deployment + Service + ConfigMap).

cloudsSecret.title: clouds.yaml Secret
cloudsSecret.description: Name of the Secret holding clouds.yaml (key: clouds.yaml). Created out-of-band with admin credentials.

serviceType.title: Service type
serviceType.description: Keystone catalog service type to proxy.

upstreamEndpoint.title: Upstream endpoint
upstreamEndpoint.description: THE key user input: the upstream Keystone identity endpoint from the catalog, e.g. http://keystone-api.openstack.svc.cluster.local:5000/v3. Leave empty to let the proxy auto-discover it from clouds.yaml.

image.title: Image
image.description: Container image for the auth-bridge proxy.

repository.title: Repository
repository.description: Image repository (must contain openstacksdk + the proxy script).

service.title: Service
service.description: Service exposing the auth-bridge inside the cluster.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Compute resource requests/limits for the proxy container.

podAnnotations.title: Pod annotations
podAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the auth-bridge pod.

nodeSelector.title: Node selector
nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the auth-bridge pod.

affinity.title: Affinity
affinity.description: Affinity rules for the auth-bridge pod.

serviceAccount.title: Service account
serviceAccount.description: Service account settings for the chart workloads.

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the ServiceAccount to use (empty uses the default).

nameOverride.title: Name override
nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names.

fullnameOverride.title: Fullname override
fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified release name.
